chat.title: GuildAI Chat
chat.subtitle: AI-powered Discord server administration assistant.
chat.readOnlyWarning: Read-only mode is active. Actions will be simulated but not executed.
chat.rateLimited: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait {seconds} seconds.
chat.noApiKey: No API key configured. Ask an admin to set one in Settings.

history.title: Chat History
history.subtitle: View and manage past conversations.
history.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

skills.title: Skill Library
skills.subtitle: Create and manage custom skills for the AI assistant.
skills.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this skill? This cannot be undone.
skills.name: Name
skills.nameHint: A descriptive name for this skill.
skills.triggerHint: The word or phrase that activates this skill when mentioned in chat.
skills.contentHint: The instructions the AI follows when this skill is triggered. Supports Markdown.

settings.title: GuildAI Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure the AI assistant for your server.

community.heading: Community
community.botNameHint: The name the bot uses to identify itself.
community.name: Community Name
community.nameHint: The bot will use this name to identify itself as part of your community.
community.defaultLanguageHint: The bot greets new conversations in this language. It always matches the user's language after the first message.
community.timezoneHint: The bot uses this timezone for date and time references (e.g. Europe/Berlin, America/New_York).

provider.heading: AI Provider
provider.apiKeyHint: Leave empty to keep the current key. Only the last 4 characters are shown.
provider.promptCachingDesc: Cache system prompts to reduce costs (Anthropic only)
provider.promptCachingHint: Caches the system prompt server-side. Repeated requests with the same prompt cost up to 90% less for input tokens.

access.heading: Access & Rate Limits
access.confirmationTimeoutHint: How long users have to confirm an action

permissions.heading: Permissions
permissions.description: Configure which actions each role can perform on each platform. Blocked roles are completely ignored. Actions are inherited from lower roles.

actions.heading: Safety
actions.readOnlyModeDesc: Simulate actions without executing them (for testing)

skills.heading: Skill Library
skills.description: Manage custom skills that extend the AI assistant's capabilities.
skills.allowedSkillPageRolesHint: Comma-separated roles that can view the Skill Library page
skills.allowedSkillManageRolesHint: Comma-separated roles that can create, edit, and delete skills
skills.allowedSkillCreateRolesHint: Comma-separated roles that can confirm AI-proposed skill creation

context.heading: Extended Context
context.label: Custom Context
context.hint: This text is provided to the AI bot as additional context in every conversation. Use it for server rules, community guidelines, or other information.

personality.heading: Extended Personality
personality.label: Custom Personality
personality.hint: Custom personality and tone instructions for the bot. This shapes how the bot writes and communicates.

gif.heading: GIF Integration
gif.apiKeyHint: Get a free API key at partner.klipy.com. Enables the bot to embed GIFs, stickers, and clips in conversations.

channel.heading: Discord Chat Channel
channel.channelIdHint: Enter the Discord channel ID where the bot should respond to messages. Leave empty to disable.
channel.maxMessagesHint: Maximum number of message pairs kept in Discord chat context before summarization (default: 10).
channel.safeActionsHint: Which actions can be executed in the Discord channel is controlled by the permissions matrix.
channel.imageRecognitionDesc: Allow the AI to recognize and analyze images sent in this channel.

mcp.heading: MCP Server
mcp.tokenHint: Use this token to connect external AI clients via MCP.

memories.title: Memories
memories.subtitle: View and manage the AI's saved memories about your community.
memories.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this memory? This cannot be undone.
memories.contentHint: Detailed information shown for recent memories (max 1000 characters).
memories.summaryPlaceholder: A shorter version of the content...
memories.summaryHint: Compressed version shown for older memories (max 300 characters).
memories.keywordsHint: Comma-separated keywords for very old memories (max 100 characters).

usage.title: Token Usage
usage.subtitle: Overview of AI token usage over the last 30 days.

error.load: Failed to load data. Please refresh the page.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
error.stream: Failed to connect to AI. Please try again.
